since_last: 43% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.01%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -0.98% · Gold -0.06% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 43% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.01%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.01%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.84%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -5.86%
cards.body: Leaders: BIDU +3.31%, AVAV +3.00%, WDAY +1.93%, GOOGL +1.91%, OKTA +1.87%. Laggards: SKHY -5.86%, ARM -4.02%, TSM -3.02%, DELL -2.71%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.45% at $135.88
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.45% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
